notes_text: Agreed to defer the new hire to Q4; Priya to revise the forecast by Friday.
Decided to renew the analytics vendor for one year; Sam to negotiate the rate.
Open item: accessibility audit still unscheduled, owner to be assigned next week.

Decision: sunset the legacy form in June; Chris to notify affected users.
Follow-up: finance needs the updated headcount numbers by end of month.
